headline: First Horizon Q1 Earnings Beat Estimates on Higher NII & Fee Income
summary: FHN tops Q1 estimates on higher NII and fee income, but rising expenses and weaker capital ratios temper gains despite solid revenue growth.

headline: U.S. Bancorp Q1 Earnings Beat Estimates on NII & Fee Revenue Growth
summary: USB beats Q1 earnings estimates as NII and fee income rise, driving profit growth and stronger efficiency despite higher credit provisions.

headline: KeyCorp (KEY) Q1 Earnings and Revenues Beat Estimates
summary: KeyCorp (KEY) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of +7.00% and +1.56%, respectively, for the quarter ended March 2026. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

headline: Earnings To Watch: Fifth Third Bancorp (FITB) Reports Q1 Results Tomorrow
summary: Regional banking company Fifth Third Bancorp (NASDAQ:FITB) will be reporting results this Friday before the bell. Here’s what you need to know.
